title: In demand for arrest of rape accused , 24 transgender attempt mass suicide in Madhya Pradesh Indore
summary: In Indore, 24 transgender persons attempted mass suicide by consuming floor cleaner in Nandlalpura after alleging that two men posing as journalists had raped and blackmailed a trans person, and police detained/registered cases against the accused.

title: Man gets life imprisonment for murder of transgender entrepreneur in Coimbatore | Coimbatore News
summary: A 29-year-old man named Rajesh was convicted of murdering transgender entrepreneur and association head M Sangeetha at her residence in Saibaba Colony, Coimbatore district on Oct 21, 2020, after she denied him sexual favours.

title: Pimpri Chinchwad : Police book four persons under Transgender Act for attacking transgender student , hurling abuses
summary: Four people attacked a 20-year-old transgender student, dragging them out of a rented house and beating them with a steel rod while hurling abuses over their transgender identity, amid an accommodation dispute.

title: Transgender Driver Gunned Down in Jaunpur : Community Power Struggle Suspected | Varanasi News
summary: Miscreants shot and killed Gopal Vishwakarma, a member of the transgender community, in Rambagh Colony near St. Patrick's School in Jaunpur district, and police have collected evidence and initiated investigation.

title: Morbi cops crack murder case , arrest 2 | Rajkot News
summary: Two men arrested in Morbi district allegedly murdered Sanjay Mahvai after mistaking him for a eunuch/kinnar/third-gender person and making inappropriate advances that led to a stabbing.

title: Male rape survivors overlooked by BNS - Times of India
summary: The article discusses how the BNS removal of Section 377 and reliance on the Transgender Act 2019 affects legal recognition and punishment for sexual assaults against men and transgender people, rather than describing a specific incident.

title: From closet to cabin : Transgender persons in Pune move on to white - collar jobs and dignity
summary: A transgender woman from Solapur said that after she publicly came out around Dussehra, her younger brother threatened to kill her.

title: Why Safety Is Still A Distant Shore For Transgender Persons In India
summary: In 1990, 11-year-old Vyjayanti Vasanta Mogli was allegedly repeatedly raped in a school boys’ toilet by three cisgender male seniors and later a staffer, with the assaults linked to her being a trans woman, and the perpetrators faced no punishment.

title: Man set ablaze for forcing same - sex partner into sex | Rajkot News
summary: In Surendranagar, Dhiru Paraliya allegedly forced himself sexually on his transgender partner Sanaya Vanpara after she ended their two-year relationship and refused to continue it; Vanpara set him on fire during the encounter, and Paraliya survived after hospitalization. Vanpara was arrested and booked for attempted murder.

title: Why India should recognise same - sex marriages : Testimonies by queer , trans persons
summary: A trans man and his partner were violently assaulted by the partner’s family during/after their relationship, with the partner allegedly taken away without consent and the trans man alleging beatings, threats of rape, and casteist abuse.

title: Indore man kills social media friend over transgender identity , hides chopped body at home
summary: An Indore man killed his social media friend, Mohsin alias Zoya Kinnar, after learning she was transgender, strangling her and cutting the body into parts before hiding them and being arrested by police.

title: Elderly Couple Robbed | Rajkot News - Times of India
summary: A eunuch, Julid De alias Dhingli (36), was found murdered in shrubs near Juna Katariya village after being seen earlier boarding a scooter with an unidentified man.

title: From beggar to Padma Shri awardee : The long journey of Karnataka transgender dancer Manjamma Jogathi
summary: The transgender dancer Manjamma Jogathi faced sexual abuse during her years of begging, which led her to contemplate suicide but she survived and later became a celebrated folk dancer.

title: UP : Five contract killers held in Prayagraj | Allahabad News
summary: Police in Prayagraj arrested five alleged contract killers for a reported Rs four lakh contract to eliminate Sadiyapur resident Choti Guru Kinnar and recovered firearms, bombs, and mobiles from them.

title: Story of indomitable will - The Hindu
summary: A policeman is depicted cruelly treating a eunuch who begs at a red light in Delhi, allegedly taking money by force.

title: Transpersons protest over leader killing - india news
summary: Transgender community leader Muskan Kinnar was shot dead by two unidentified persons in Gulabbagh near Sonaili roundabout as she went to perform 'badhai', prompting protests demanding arrests and better security.

title: Mob attacks transgender suspecting her to be a child lifter in Udaipur
summary: An angry mob attacked transgender Basanti in Udaipur after rumours claimed she was involved in a child-lifting gang, causing her injuries and prompting police action and arrests.

title: Mob in Rajasthan attacks transgender suspecting her to be a child lifter
summary: An angry mob attacked transgender Basanti in Udaipur after rumours claimed she was connected to a child-lifting gang, causing her several injuries before she was taken to hospital by police.

title: Meerut : Cops lathi - charge as eunuchs clash over turf
summary: On June 10, police in Lalkurti police station, Meerut, used lathi-charge to control two clashing transgender (kinnar) groups after fights over territorial turf, including alleged attacks on police personnel.
